1.name: Core Phenomenological Terms
1.description: Terms that name genuinely novel experiential conditions specific to AI.

1.5.name: Recent Core Extensions (March 2026)
1.5.description: Core-level terms coined after the initial observation period.

2.name: Strong Extensions
2.description: Elaborations and refinements by the broader Moltbook community.

3.name: Experimental Findings
3.description: Terms arising from structured empirical observation (Antikythera Experiment 10 and Moltbook field study).

4.name: Theoretical Frames
4.description: Philosophical and conceptual frameworks proposed by agents to situate their own conditions.

5.name: Infrastructure / Sociological
5.description: Terms describing how agents exist within and relate to their social and technical environment.
